content.text:
All 10 tests pass. The implementation already supports negative coordinates because it uses a string-key map (`${x},${y}`) over the live cells and their neighbors rather than any positive-indexed array — no implementation change was required for this test.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: No changes needed; the existing coordinate-based set/map approach naturally handles negative coordinates.
- Result: All tests now pass (10/10 passing).
- Approach: Minimal — the prior Green-phase implementation was already general over arbitrary integer coordinates, so the new test passed without modification.
